name: NextCure, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company that is focused on advancing innovative medicines that treat cancer patients that do not respond to, or that have disease progression on, current therapies, through the use of targeted therapies, including antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs). An ADC consists of a monoclonal antibody conjugated to a cytotoxic drug via a chemical linker. We focus on advancing therapies that leverage our core strengths in understanding biological pathway...
